source_document: Transnet National Ports Authority Tariff Book, April 2024 - March 2025
extraction_note: Produced via src/extract_rules.py; per-port rates verified against the tariff PDF tables (sections 2.1.1, 3.3, 3.6, 3.8). Durban is the published ground-truth reference.

rules.name: Light Dues
rules.notes: National rate, per 100 GT or part thereof.

rules.name: Port Dues
rules.notes: National: basic per 100 GT + per 100 GT per 24h period (pro rata).

rules.name: Towage Dues
rules.notes: East London column; band base + increment per 100 GT above floor; entering + leaving.

rules.name: VTS Dues
rules.notes: 0.54 per GT per port call (standard rate); min 235.52.

rules.name: Pilotage Dues
rules.notes: East London column; basic fee + per 100 GT; entering + leaving.

rules.name: Running of Vessel Lines
rules.notes: Berthing Services; basic fee + per 100 GT; berthing + unberthing.
